scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist/assets/screenshots dist/assets/mapycom dist/assets/osm dist/assets/google dist/icons && cp manifest.json browser-polyfill.js *.js *.html LICENSE dist/ && cp -r assets/screenshots/* dist/assets/screenshots/ && cp -r assets/mapycom/* dist/assets/mapycom/ && cp -r assets/osm/* dist/assets/osm/ && cp -r assets/google/* dist/assets/google/ && cp icons/icon.png icons/icon_black.svg icons/icon_orange.svg dist/icons/
scripts.zip: npm run build && cd dist && zip -r ../moremaps.zip ./*
